scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend/api-gateway && npm install --prefix backend/microservices/aircraft-service && npm install --prefix backend/microservices/maintenance-service && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:aircraft" "npm run dev:maintenance" "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend/api-gateway && npm run build --prefix backend/microservices/aircraft-service && npm run build --prefix backend/microservices/maintenance-service && npm run build --prefix frontend
